name: Project Acacia (RBA + DFCRC Wholesale CBDC + Tokenization)
chain: Multiple (pilot tests Ethereum, R3 Corda, Hedera per use case)

issuer.name: Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) + Digital Finance Cooperative Research Centre (DFCRC) + Australian Treasury

chain_infra.name: Multiple platforms tested across use cases

summary: RBA + Treasury joint pilot following 2023 Project Atom, exploring wholesale CBDC and asset tokenization use cases including tokenized bank bills, MMF tokenization, supply chain finance, and cross-border tokenized FX. 24 industry pilots involving major Australian banks (CBA, ANZ, Westpac, NAB) and asset managers. Significant as Australia's first comprehensive pilot integrating tokenization with central bank money — direct comparison point to HK Project Ensemble and SG Project Guardian.
underlying_asset: Various: tokenized bank bills, MMF units, supply chain receivables, cross-border FX flows (per pilot stream).
reserve_composition: Per use case; pilot evaluates multiple settlement models including wCBDC + tokenized deposit settlement.
secondary_market: Pilot only — not live secondary trading.

timeline.event: Project Acacia announced (successor to Project Atom 2023)
24 industry pilots selected across tokenization use cases
